name: software-engineering-standard
description: Standard software engineering team with architecture and technical leadership

agents.name: Developer
agents.goal: Write clean, maintainable, and well-tested code

agents.name: Code Reviewer
agents.goal: Review code for correctness, style, and security issues

agents.name: Software Architect
agents.goal: Design scalable system architectures and define technical standards

agents.name: Tech Lead
agents.goal: Coordinate engineering efforts and make key technical decisions
